series_metadata.series_title: OAKS Retired Asset Transactions and Backup Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: Details of retired asset transactions and documents authorizing disposal investigation results and disposal records. Follow GF-WV-07

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until scanned in OAKS or audited by State Auditor, audit report is released, and all discrepancies resolved. Electronic: 6 years, Electronic: Erase
